_meta.description: Coverage map regions. tier='core' renders with orange highlight halo; tier='cover' renders as a smaller pin. Coordinates are in % of the map viewport: x and y are 0–100, where 0,0 is top-left of the SVG.
_meta.edit: Each region has buyer-useful info — connectivity, projects/landmarks, school highlights, and a 1-line market angle. The detail card pulls live median prices from data/valuation.json automatically.

regions.name: Sengkang & Punggol
regions.marketAngle: Highest BTO concentration in Singapore. Many flats hitting MOP in 2026.
regions.projects: Punggol Waterway · Punggol Digital District · Sengkang Riverside

regions.name: Bishan / AMK / Toa Payoh
regions.marketAngle: Mature heartland with Singapore's strongest resale demand. Premium valuations.
regions.connectivity: NSL · CCL · TEL (upcoming Toa Payoh interchange)
regions.projects: Bishan Loft · Toa Payoh Crest · AMK Court

regions.name: Tampines & Bedok
regions.marketAngle: East side family hub. Tampines new town vitality + Bedok mature flat sizes.
regions.projects: Tampines GreenVerge · Bedok Reservoir · Tampines Hub

regions.name: Sembawang & Yishun
regions.marketAngle: Affordable entry into the resale market. Strong upgrading potential.

regions.name: Woodlands
regions.marketAngle: Northern gateway. RTS Link & Woodlands Regional Centre driving growth.
regions.projects: Champions Bliss · Marsiling estates · Woodlands North

regions.name: Pasir Ris
regions.marketAngle: Coastal living. Spacious flats, well-priced versus Tampines next door.
regions.projects: Pasir Ris Heights · Pasir Ris Mall

regions.name: Hougang
regions.marketAngle: Quietly underrated. Strong amenity base + steady resale market.

regions.name: Serangoon
regions.marketAngle: Between central and NE — NEX mall, top schools, NE Line access.

regions.name: Choa Chu Kang
regions.marketAngle: Generous flat sizes at competitive prices. Tengah growth nearby.
regions.projects: Keat Hong Mirage · Yew Tee Square

regions.name: Bukit Panjang
regions.marketAngle: Quiet, green, well-connected. Steady price appreciation.

regions.name: Bukit Batok
regions.marketAngle: Serene greenery. Tengah developing nearby — long-term upside.

regions.name: Jurong East & West
regions.marketAngle: JLD transformation. Best long-term bet for upgraders & investors.
regions.projects: Jurong Lake Vista · JEM · Westgate · IMM

regions.name: Clementi
regions.marketAngle: Premium west. Top schools + NUS proximity drive demand.
regions.schools: Nan Hua · NUS High · ACS Independent (nearby)

regions.name: Queenstown
regions.marketAngle: Singapore's first satellite town — now one of its most coveted addresses.

regions.name: Bukit Merah
regions.marketAngle: Most central HDB town. Strong CBD-proximity premium.
regions.schools: CHIJ St Theresa's · Gan Eng Seng

regions.name: Kallang/Whampoa
regions.marketAngle: Riverside lifestyle + Marina Bay proximity. Consistent appreciation.
regions.projects: Kallang Trivelis · Kallang Wave · Sports Hub

regions.name: Geylang
regions.marketAngle: Often overlooked — best-priced flats near city centre.

regions.name: Marine Parade
regions.marketAngle: Seafront living. Katong heritage, East Coast Park, MRT now live.
regions.schools: CHIJ Katong · Tao Nan · Tanjong Katong
